mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM products WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, description, category_id, brand, price, original_price, stock, sales, status, is_featured, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{brand}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{sales}, #{status}, #{isFeatured}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET sales = #{sales} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET stock = #{stock} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1
